args.query: SELECT gmap_id, name FROM business_description WHERE description ILIKE '%Los Angeles, CA%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT gmap_id, name FROM business_description WHERE description ILIKE '%Los Angeles, CA%';

args.query: SELECT gmap_id, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating, COUNT(*) AS review_count FROM review WHERE gmap_id IN ('gmap_44','gmap_41','gmap_43','gmap_38','gmap_39','gmap_42','gmap_40') GROUP BY gmap_id ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, review_count DESC LIMIT 5;

exec_args.sql: SELECT gmap_id, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating, COUNT(*) AS review_count FROM review WHERE gmap_id IN ('gmap_44','gmap_41','gmap_43','gmap_38','gmap_39','gmap_42','gmap_40') GROUP BY gmap_id ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, review_count DESC LIMIT 5;

args.code:
import json, pandas as pd
biz = pd.DataFrame(var_call_OXVhKqgEIOjV8ckBk5ft1XPD)
ratings = pd.DataFrame(var_call_8Ce3q0E92z9iLUbQ4z04xXEE)
ratings['avg_rating'] = ratings['avg_rating'].astype(float)
ratings['review_count'] = ratings['review_count'].astype(int)
out = ratings.merge(biz, on='gmap_id', how='left')[['name','gmap_id','avg_rating','review_count']]
out = out.sort_values(['avg_rating','review_count','name'], ascending=[False,False,True]).head(5)
result = out.to_dict(orient='records')
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(result))
